content:
I am excited to share that our submission, Emergent Feedback Loops from Crosstalk in Directed Labeled Graphs, based on our paper Motifs and Emergent Feedback in Labeled Graphs, joint work with @John Baez has been accepted for an in-person oral presentation at the Conference on Complex Systems (CCS 2026) — https://ccs26.cssociety.org.
Excited to present this work and engage with the complex systems community at CCS 2026!

Submitted abstract is attached:
CCS2026-Chaudhuri_Adittya.pdf
